title: Infosys and Cognition Announce Strategic Collaboration to Scale Devin Across Global Enterprises
detailed_summary: Infosys and Cognition announced a strategic collaboration on January 07, 2026 to scale Devin, Cognition's AI software engineer, across global enterprises. The collaboration will deploy Devin across Infosys' internal engineering ecosystem and client engagements worldwide, integrating Cognition's agentic and autonomous engineering capabilities with Infosys Topaz Fabric. Infosys said it had used Devin for the past six months and seen significant improvement in engineering quality and efficiency. The initiative targets accelerated software development, improved developer productivity, faster time-to-market, reduced modernization timelines, brown field engineering automation, tech debt reduction, modernization, and production and maintenance problem resolution. Infosys' Financial Services practice is leading the first wave of joint client engagements across banking, payments, capital markets, insurance, and wealth management.
